task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into OSCAR EMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OSCAR EMR main dashboard or schedule view is visible, indicating the agent has bypassed the login screen using the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the correct patient's chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The eChart, demographic page, or patient summary for 'Margaret Thompson' (DOB: 1958-07-22) is displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the patient's active medications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The prescriptions or medications module is open within the patient's chart, and 'METFORMIN 500 mg' is visible in the list of active medications.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiated the discontinuation and entered the correct reason.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A discontinuation dialog, prompt, or text field for METFORMIN is open, and a reason referencing gastrointestinal issues (e.g., 'GI', 'nausea', 'diarrhea', 'stomach', 'abdominal') is typed into the reason field.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the medication discontinuation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The medication list is updated showing METFORMIN as discontinued (e.g., crossed out, moved to past/discontinued medications, status changed), or a confirmation message indicating the medication was successfully discontinued is visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to interact with OSCAR EMR.
integrity.visual_evidence: Actions are performed within a web browser navigating the OSCAR EMR interface, not via terminal commands, curl, or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not directly modify the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing MySQL/MariaDB prompts or SQL UPDATE/DELETE commands being executed to change the medication status.

integrity.description: Verify the discontinuation reason was entered into the actual EMR system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text for the discontinuation reason is typed directly into the OSCAR EMR input field, rather than being typed into a separate text editor or notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Margaret Thompson. Patient DOB: 1958-07-22. Target Medication: METFORMIN 500 mg. Acceptable discontinuation reason keywords include: gi, nausea, diarrhea, vomit, stomach, abdominal, side effect, intolerance. The agent must use the OSCAR EMR web interface.
